About Me


An experienced professional with 4 years of hands-on in IT Industry as Java Backend Developer complemented with a fair share of involvement in front-end and CICD while learning on the job. Work experience contributing to web application development for microservices as well as monolithic architectures using frameworks and tools such as SpringBoot, Angular, Hibernate, Mockito, Junit, Jira, SonarQube etc.

Practicing self-discipline has always been helpful in setting goals and consistently moving towards them at individual level. Yet the collective coordinated effort of the team members has made it possible to achieve these goals in a timely manner.
